title: Commitment to Countering Cartel Criminal Activity
summary: Proclamation 11015, issued by President Donald J. Trump on March 7, 2026, outlines the United States' commitment to dismantling cartels and foreign terrorist organizations in the Western Hemisphere. The proclamation emphasizes the need to operationalize hard power through the Americas Counter Cartel Coalition, involving 17 countries. Key actions include demolishing criminal cartels and foreign terrorist organizations, coordinating with allies to deny them resources and territorial control, training and mobilizing partner nation militaries to combat their influence, and keeping external threats from outside the Western Hemisphere at bay. The U.S. will utilize all necessary resources and legal authorities to address these threats.
